posts.author: elkemoshel (Elke Moshel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Lets hear it for the funnel chart widget
The funnel chart widget is a new reporting tool that allows you to follow the flow of the deal from new to won/lost. Not only does the funnel chart show the current statuses of the deals/leads, but it also calculates the transitions between status labels (i.e. the conversion % of a deal from “New” to “Won”).

To add it to any other board, first add a dashboard view onto your board. Then, click on “Add widget”, select “More widgets” from the resulting menu, and locate the “Funnel Chart”.

The Funnel Chart is also fully interactive! Try filtering the chart according to the owner or funnel start date, and click on each pillar to learn how many items are within that stage of the funnel.

To learn more - read here We’d love to hear your experience with it

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: ArthurSanford (Arthur Aureliano Sanford Guimarães)
posts.cookedHtml: The widget is great! But when i configure to display the informartion the way i want, and then refresh the page, all my configuration vanishes and resets the widget.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Hope you can make this widget also work with large Boards (more than 20.000 items). The widget is super useful with Opportunities and in my opinion shouldn’t be limited to just 20k rows. Deserves an expansion like the other Dashboard Widgets.

posts.author: Chfraym (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this as well. Super important! Worth paying for
